case_title: PACIFIC TEA COMPANY INC. DBA THE TEA COMPANY VS TWINKLE INC. DBA STARS RESTAURANT et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TWINKLE INC. DBA STARS RESTAURANT

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,847.37 FILED BY PACIFIC TEA COMPANY INC. DBA THE TEA COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT TWINKLE INC. DBA STARS RESTAURANT TOWER, JEREMIAH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-15-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PACIFIC TEA COMPANY INC. DBA THE TEA COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TWINKLE INC. DBA STARS RESTAURANT TOWER, JEREMIAH $1,847.37 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,893.37, TOWER DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT TWINKLE INC. DBA STARS RESTAURANT TOWER, JEREMIAH
